description: Interview CV separation fixtures. The committed source of truth the real-stack separation harness (tests/test_interview_regression.py) asserts against. Human-readable ground truth and populate steps live in manifest.md.

good.note: Looked into the lens, one hand gesture visible.

bad.note: Read from notes held off-axis, no gesture.

slouch.note: Deliberate lateral lean, one shoulder dropped well below the other.
